message:
feat(templates): add skill scaffolding template system Core Template Engine (src/templates.rs): - Define SkillTemplate struct with name, description, and content fields - Implement built-in templates: minimal, standard, detailed - Template content uses placeholder syntax ({{skill_name}}, {{purpose}}) - render() method substitutes placeholders with provided values - get_builtin() returns predefined templates by name - list_builtin_names() returns available template names Template CLI Command (src/cli/commands/template.rs): - ms template list - display available templates - ms template show - display template content - ms template render --skill-name --purpose

- generate - Supports --robot flag for JSON output - Validates template name existence before operations Module Registration (src/lib.rs): - Add pub mod templates to expose template functionality Unit Tests (tests/unit/template_tests.rs, tests/unit/main.rs): - Register template_tests module - Test template rendering with placeholder substitution - Test missing placeholder handling (left as-is) - Test builtin template retrieval The template system provides quick scaffolding for new skills, ensuring consistent structure and reducing boilerplate. Templates can be extended with custom definitions in future versions. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5
